title: Attach telemetry handlers for all three Oban job events
prompt: Write a `MyApp.Application.start/2` function that attaches telemetry handlers for all three Oban job lifecycle events — `[:oban, :job, :start]`, `[:oban, :job, :stop]`, and `[:oban, :job, :exception]` — via a single `:telemetry.attach_many/4` call. The handler function lives in `MyApp.ObanHandler.handle_event/4` and should pattern-match on the three event names. Log starts at debug level, stops at debug with duration, exceptions at error level with worker/kind/reason. The `start/2` function also starts `MyApp.Repo` and `Oban` as children. Write both modules to `lib/my_app/application.ex`.
tier_rationale: Requires the exact tuples (all three, not two), the `attach_many` form (not a loop of `attach`), and placement in `start/2`, not `perform/1`. Mid-depth knowledge.
